summary: Hydrated preflight shows no security-sensitive items. #65636 remains the canonical open feature request; #66023 is the current focused implementation lane but is not merge-ready and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job. #40218 is overlapping useful contributor work with unique surfaces, so it stays open as related rather than being closed. #65669 is already closed and remains historical superseded context.
